evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of three specific trigger types: time-based (24h before), event-based (booking confirmed), and condition-based (payment due). While the evidence includes scenarios for event-based and condition-based triggers, there is no mention or evidence of a time-based trigger being implemented or tested, indicating a gap in coverage for this requirement.
evidencePointers: linkedUseCases: UC-129 mentions time-based triggers but lacks evidence of implementation.
priorStepEvidence does not include any evidence for time-based notifications.
gaps: No evidence of time-based trigger (24h before) implementation.
